info.title: Global Disaster Alert and Coordination System  API
info.description: An ASP.NET Core Web API for getting GDACS data

get.summary: Get the eventdata for AdaptiveCard
Get the  AdaptiveCard  by parameters

Search a list of events by parameter, it returns the first 100 elements, it is possible to obtain record by paging specifying the page size and page number.
The records are ordered by todate desc

parameters.name: eventlist
parameters.description: the list of eventtypes to search

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Optional: the number of record in the page (Max 100)

parameters.name: pageNumber
parameters.description: Optional: the page number of recordset

AdditionalData.description: The class represent the additional data related to volcano

dateString.description: The date in string format to show on the table ("dd/MM")

Daily.description: The daily class with the info of news daily

disasternumber.description: The disaster number, which is a unique identifier for the disaster in the EMDAT database.

historical.description: Flag to indicate if it is an historical disaster or not.

classificationkey.description: The classification key, which is used to categorize the disaster in the EMDAT database.

groupname.description: The group name, which is used to group similar disasters together in the EMDAT database.

subgroupname.description: The subgroup name, which is used to further categorize the disaster within its group in the EMDAT database.

disastertype.description: The disaster type, which indicates the nature of the disaster (e.g., earthquake, flood, etc.).

disastersubtype.description: the disaster subtype, which provides more specific information about the type of disaster (e.g., tropical cyclone, drought, etc.).

externalids.description: The external IDs, which are used to link the disaster to external sources or databases for additional information.

disastername.description: The disaster name, which is a descriptive name for the disaster.

iso3.description: The ISO 3 code, which is a three-letter country code used to identify the country associated with the disaster.

country.description: The country name, which provides the full name of the country associated with the disaster.

subregion.description: The subregion, which provides additional geographical information about the location of the disaster within the country (e.g., region, state, province).

location.description: The location, which provides specific information about the geographical area affected by the disaster (e.g., city, town, or region).

origin.description: The origin, which indicates the source or origin of the disaster data (e.g., national disaster agency, international organization).

associatedtype.description: The associated type, which provides additional information about the nature of the disaster (e.g., natural disaster, technological disaster).

ofdaresponse.description: The falg to indicate if the disaster is a complex emergency or not.

appeal.description: The flag to indicate if the disaster is a complex emergency or not.

declaration.description: The flag to indicate if the disaster has a declaration or not

aidcontribution.description: The flag to indicate if the disaster has a AID contibution

magnitude.description: The magnitude of the disaster, which is a numerical value representing the severity or intensity of the disaster (e.g., earthquake magnitude, flood level).

latitude.description: The latitude of the disaster location, which indicates the geographical coordinate of the disaster's epicenter or affected area.

longitude.description: The longitude of the disaster location, which indicates the geographical coordinate of the disaster's epicenter or affected area.

riverbasin.description: The riverbasin , which provides information about the river basin associated with the disaster, if applicable (e.g., for floods or water-related disasters).

volcanoid.description: The volcano id if the disaster is a volcanic event, which is a unique identifier for the volcano associated with the disaster.

startyear.description: The start year of the event

startmonth.description: The start month of the event, which indicates the month when the disaster event began (1 for January, 2 for February, etc.).

startday.description: The start day of the event, which indicates the day when the disaster event began (1 for the first day of the month, 2 for the second day, etc.).

endyear.description: The end year of the event, which indicates the year when the disaster event ended or was last recorded.

endmonth.description: The end month of the event, which indicates the month when the disaster event ended or was last recorded (1 for January, 2 for February, etc.).

endday.description: The end day of the event, which indicates the day when the disaster event ended or was last recorded (1 for the first day of the month, 2 for the second day, etc.).

numaffected.description: The number of affected people, which indicates the total number of individuals affected by the disaster, including those injured, displaced, or otherwise impacted.

numhomeless.description: The number of displaced people, which indicates the total number of individuals who were forced to leave their homes due to the disaster.

totalaffected.description: The total number of people affected by the disaster, which includes all individuals who were impacted in any way (e.g., deaths, injuries, displacement).

reconstrdam.description: The reconstruction damage, which indicates the estimated cost of rebuilding or repairing infrastructure and property damaged by the disaster.

reconstrdamadj.description: The reconstruction damage adjusted, which indicates the estimated cost of rebuilding or repairing infrastructure and property damaged by the disaster, adjusted for inflation or other factors.

insurdam.description: The insured damage, which indicates the estimated cost of damage covered by insurance policies as a result of the disaster.

insurdamadj.description: The insured damage adjusted, which indicates the estimated cost of damage covered by insurance policies as a result of the disaster, adjusted for inflation or other factors.

totaldam.description: The total damage, which indicates the overall estimated cost of damage caused by the disaster, including both insured and uninsured losses.

totaldamadj.description: The total damage adjusted, which indicates the overall estimated cost of damage caused by the disaster, adjusted for inflation or other factors.

cpi.description: The total economic damage, which indicates the overall estimated cost of economic losses caused by the disaster, including both direct and indirect impacts.

fromDate.description: The from date of the disaster, which indicates the start date of the disaster event based on startyear, startmonth, and startday properties.

toDate.description: The end date of the disaster, which indicates the end date of the disaster event based on endyear, endmonth, and endday properties.

eventkeys.description: The list of key-event related to this emdat

Emdat.description: The emdat class to expose information

link.description: The link of the original news

EmmNews.description: Class to represent the Emmnews to export

ErrMsg.description: Class to exposes the error message

alertLevelTotals.description: The list of alertlevels and the count

eventtypeTotals.description: The list of eventtype and the count by alertlevel

details.description: The list of events with small details

HistoricalEvents.description: the class that represente the historical events, and counter for a specific country in a date range

referenceDate.description: The reference date of the data recorded

referenceDateStr.description: The reference date of the data recorded in string format

lastHour.description: Numer of news in the last hour

MediaCoverage.description: The media coverage class with detailed info

pubdate.description: The date when the news was published

datefrom.description: The date range for the news, indicating when it is valid or relevant

dateto.description: The end date of the news validity period, if applicable

title.description: The title of the news article or entry

description.description: The description of the news article, providing additional context or information

shortdescription.description: The Short description of the news article, providing a brief summary

link.description: The external link to the news article or resource, allowing users to access the full content

author.description: The author of the news article, typically the person or organization that created it

visible.description: Flag indicating whether the news is visible or not

dateinsert.description: The date when the news was inserted into the system

datemodified.description: The date when the news was last modified

type.description: The type of the geojson object

SesismicCollection.description: the class that represent seismic data collection

type.description: The type of the geojson object

SesismicFeature.description: the class that represent a seismic feature

icon.description: The link of the icon representing the seismic event

class.description: The class used to represent geometri on the map

SesismicProperties.description: The     properties of the seismic event

StatisticEmmNews.description: Class to expose the EMM news statistic

StatsAlertLevel.description: Class to expose the alertlevel and the count

StatsEventtype.description: Class to expose the eventtype with detailed alertlevel

vaaccenter.description: The vaac center that emitted the advisory

plumHeight.description: The plume hieght in meter (the observed one)

vei.description: The VEI calculated (the based on the observed plume)

rmkPlumHeight.description: The plume specified in the remarks

VaacBulletin.description: The model to represent the VAAC data info

vaaccenter.description: The vaac center that emitted the advisory

plumHeight.description: The plume hieght in meter (the observed one)

vei.description: The VEI calculated (the based on the observed plume)

VaacDataInfo.description: The model to represent the VAAC main data info

type.description: Type of the GeoJSON object, always "Feature"

VolcanoFeature.description: The class to represent the volcano feature

maxVei.description: The max vei assigned to volcano

icon.description: The icon link to represent volcano

class.description: The class assignet to volcano for the representation on map

latestVaacCount.description: The number of Vaa emitted for the volcano in the period requested

latestVaacDate.description: The date of the latest vaa emitted

latestVaacDateStr.description: The Date in string format of the latest vaa emitted

urlApiSeismicData.description: The url to obtain the seismic data

currentDetail.description: The detail information about current situation

highDetail.description: the detail of highest value detected in the period

lastDetail.description: the detail of latest  value detected in the period

seismicData.description: The info related to seismic data for the volcano

VolcanoProperties.description: The class to represent the volcano properties

icon.description: The link of the icon representing the seismic event

class.description: The class used to represent geometri on the map

type.description: Type of the GeoJSON object, always "FeatureCollection"

VolcanoesCollection.description: The class to represent the volcano collection data to export as GeoJSON format
